hero.sub: Find out exactly how much each watch, listen, or session actually costs you. Is it worth it?

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1_desc: Search from 60+ pre-loaded services or enter your own.
howItWorks.step2_desc: How many times per month do you actually use it?
howItWorks.step3_desc: See your real cost-per-use and whether it's worth keeping.

calculator.title: Calculate Value
calculator.no_matches_hint: Try searching for a category like "Music" or "Fitness".
calculator.error_select: Please select a subscription from the list.
calculator.error_cost: Please enter a valid cost greater than 0.
calculator.error_usage: Please enter how many times you use it per month.

verdict.break_even_times: × per month to justify the cost at the "worth it" threshold.
verdict.detail_zero: You're paying {{cost}}/mo for nothing. That's {{annual}} a year gone.
verdict.detail_good: At {{cost}}/{{unit}}, you are well under the {{benchmark}} benchmark for {{category}}. Keep it!
verdict.detail_consider: At {{cost}}/{{unit}}, you are pushing the {{benchmark}} benchmark for {{category}}. Use it more or find a better deal.
verdict.detail_wasted: At {{cost}}/{{unit}}, you are well above the {{benchmark}} benchmark for {{category}}. Cancel or downgrade.
verdict.runway_impact: At {{cost}}/mo, this subscription uses up roughly {{days}} days of financial runway per year. Cancel it and keep {{annual}} working for your freedom.

sidebar.quick_tip_text: Set a reminder 3 days before any free trial ends. Companies count on you forgetting!

reminder.title: Set a Renewal Reminder
reminder.permission_denied: Notification permission denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.

dashboard.title: My Subscription Dashboard
dashboard.empty: No subscriptions added yet. Calculate one above to add it here.

runway.toggle_sub: Calculate how long your savings can sustain you
runway.title: Freedom Runway Calculator
runway.survive: How long can you survive without income?
runway.reduction_desc: Reduces discretionary spending (Food, Subs, Entertainment, etc.) by {{pct}}%.
runway.safety_buffer_desc: Lock 3 months of expenses as "untouchable" emergency fund.

footer.tagline: Stop guessing where your money goes. Calculate your financial runway and discover the true cost of your subscriptions with our privacy-first, client-side tools.
footer.disclaimer_short: This site is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice.

trust.privacy_badge: 100% private — your data never leaves this browser
